business_description.nature_of_business: Regional trucking and freight logistics — LTL and FTL, general freight, warehousing and distribution services across the Midwest and Mid-Atlantic corridors

coverages_discussed.notes: Policy number shown as WC GLFS 2025 8820.

positives: GPS tracking or ELD devices installed in all vehicles
MVR checks performed on all drivers at least annually
Applicant maintains a valid DOT number and MC authority
Sleeper-cab tractors used for long-haul operations
CDL licenses verified for all drivers
Prior insurance history shows no cancellations
concerns: Most recent CSA BASIC score in Crash Indicator is above intervention threshold and is currently being addressed
